items.title: India’s UFC trailblazer Puja Tomar walks into the biggest fight of her career yet
items.summary: Pooja Tomar stands at a career crossroads as she prepares to face China’s Shi Ming in her third UFC bout in Macau. At 32, victory is pivotal for India’s first female UFC fighter...
